name: e2e-tree-topology
description: Tree topology launches a root then child tasks through explicit parent links.

tasks.task: Reply exactly TREE_ROOT_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.

If the DAG Dependency Context lists tree-root as completed and includes TREE_ROOT_TOKEN in an output preview, reply exactly E2E_TREE_CHILD_OK. Otherwise reply E2E_TREE_CHILD_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
